scripts.dev: bun run --cwd apps/api dev & bun run --cwd apps/worker dev & bun run --cwd apps/web dev
scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/contracts build && bun run --cwd packages/email build && bun run --cwd apps/api build && bun run --cwd apps/worker build && bun run --cwd apps/web build
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p apps/api/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p apps/worker/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/contracts/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/email/tsconfig.json && bun run --cwd apps/web astro check
scripts.verify: bun install && bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun run build
